response.justification: Exceptional candidate with 15+ years of full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ year requirement, with direct mastery of primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React). Current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks directly addresses a key required skill. Specific framework gaps (Nest.js, Vitest, PostgreSQL/MySQL specifics) are minor and manageable given demonstrated architectural thinking and testing rigor.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack development experience with proven expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React across diverse roles and industries
Current Staff Engineer position with active AI-agent infrastructure work, including MCP code generators—directly addressing a required technical skill
Software craftsmanship foundation demonstrated through TDD advocacy, architecture design, and mentoring via workshops and talks
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned in experience despite being primary stack framework
Vitest and Playwright not called out in testing experience; PostgreSQL and MySQL not mentioned (only MongoDB and generic SQL)
Kubernetes mentioned only in passing for one project; container experience focuses more on Docker than orchestration tooling

key_factors.factor: Full-stack experience with primary tech stack
